title: verbascum × semirigidum
intro: Verbascum × semirigidum is a hybrid plant species within the Verbascum genus, commonly known as mullein. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × semirigidum include soothing respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, and alleviating skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Verbascum × semirigidum are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
